scripts.validate: npm run build && node bin/adoption-eval.js validate --input examples/cli/support-triage-workflow.example.json
scripts.map: npm run build && node bin/adoption-eval.js map --input examples/cli/support-triage-workflow.example.json --out examples/out
scripts.eval: npm run build && node bin/adoption-eval.js eval --input examples/cli/support-triage-workflow.example.json --out examples/out
scripts.run: npm run build && node bin/adoption-eval.js run --input examples/cli/support-triage-workflow.example.json --out examples/out
